books.title: Some Haunted Houses of England & Wales
books.author: Elliott O'Donnell
books.notes: First edition 1908. Eveleigh Nash, Fawside House. Pictorial cloth boards with moonlit haunted house scene in gilt/black. 36 watchers, 9 bids. Elliott O'Donnell associate of Society for Psychical Research. Strong occult/supernatural collector market.

books.title: Letters on Demonology and Witchcraft
books.author: Sir Walter Scott
books.notes: Second edition 1857. William Tegg, 75 Cheapside. Full leather binding with marbled boards, brass clasps, engraved frontispiece (Joan of Arc). 45 watchers, 28 bids. Addressed to J.G. Lockhart Esq. Exceptional result — Victorian occult/demonology with decorative binding.

books.title: Sketches of Imposture, Deception and Credulity
books.author: Davenport
books.notes: First edition 1837. Thomas Tegg and Son, 73 Cheapside. Full leather binding with marbled boards, brass clasps, engraved frontispiece (Joan of Arc / armoured figure). 13 watchers, 5 bids, £33.99 with 21 mins to go — likely sold higher. South Sea Bubble, delusion, psychology of deception. Same binding house as the Walter Scott.

books.title: Tregeagle's Head: A Romance of the Cornish Cliffs
books.notes: Silas K. Hocking. Frederick Warne & Co. 1890. Illustrated by T.M. Hemy. Green pictorial gilt boards, embossed design. Very good condition. Bought eBay auction, sold Vinted.

books.title: Frank Buckland Curiosty of Natural History 4th series
books.notes: i bought it and read it first before listing, and sold it within 24 hours of actual listing

books.title: Among The Stars Agnes Gilberne
books.notes: listed a few days after receiving. Sold within 8 hours. maybe even undersold, not sure.

books.title: In Starry Realms By Sir Robert S Ball
books.notes: Didn't list straight away. Sold in 24 hours
